news.headline: Brent Crude futures settle at $70.95/bbl, up $1.39, 2%.

Franklin Templeton files Solana ETF appl. via Cboe; urges SEC to allow staking for added rewards. SEC delays decision on altcoin ETFs incl. Solana, LTC, DOGE, XRP. Analyst predicts approval by Oct 2025. Franklin Templeton CEO expects Trump admin to integrate crypto into traditional finance.
news.summary: The Chicago Board Options BZX Exchange (Cboe) has applied to list a Solana (SOL) exchange-traded fund (ETF) for Franklin Templeton in the US. The proposed ETF will hold spot SOL and stake underlying crypto for extra rewards. Other companies like Grayscale and VanEck have also applied for Solana-based investment vehicles. Former SEC Chair's resignation in Jan 2025 led to more crypto ETF filings, but on Mar 11, the SEC delayed decisions on Solana, Litecoin, Dogecoin, and XRP ETFs to evaluate rule changes. Bloomberg's ETF analyst says this extended review doesn't impact approval likelihood, with the final deadline in Oct 2025. Franklin Templeton CEO anticipates the Trump administration integrating traditional finance with crypto, suggesting future blockchain-based ETFs.

news.headline: United Education Institute opens new campus in Albuquerque at 885 Sunset Rd SW, offering career training programs to empower community.
news.summary: In Albuquerque, New Mexico, on March 12, 2025, United Education Institute (UEI) revealed the launch of its latest campus. Situated at 885 Sunset Rd SW, the new location provides various practical training programs. UEI is renowned for its career-oriented education and this expansion marks a significant development for the institute's national presence.

NYMEX WTI Crude April futures settle at $67.68 a barrel, up $1.43, 2.16%.

American Egg Board's President and CEO, Emily Metz, addresses egg prices amid supply disruption and price volatility in the market.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Chicago, it was highlighted that American egg farmers recognize the significance of accessible and reasonably priced eggs for consumers reliant on them. The disruption in the country's egg supply has led to price instability. This issue has impacted a substantial number of individuals who regularly rely on eggs.

news.headline: Summit Orthopedics in Woodbury, MN is the first ASC in the US to receive Shoulder Arthroplasty certification, alongside Spine Fusion and Advanced Total Hip and Knee Replacement designations.
news.summary: In Woodbury, Minnesota, on March 12, 2025, Summit Orthopedics announced that their ambulatory surgery center achieved certifications for Spine Fusion and Advanced Total Hip and Knee Replacement. This makes it the first freestanding ASC in the country to attain all three designations.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price could drop to $73K as momentum slows, facing key moving average. Short BTC ETFs rise, signaling caution.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market has hit a roadblock with the momentum slowing down. Analysts predict a further decline in bitcoin's value due to encountering a significant moving average. The popularity of short Bitcoin Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) has surged amidst this trend. Financial experts are cautioning that bitcoin could potentially drop to $73,000, marking a critical period for the digital currency.

news.headline: Investors sold Meta and Apple in February after a historic run but were net buyers. Apple and Meta were top sells.
news.summary: According to a recent Schwab trading activity report, investors were overall net buyers during February. However, popular tech giants Meta and Apple were the top sells among investors. Specifically, investors chose to offload their shares in Meta after a remarkable performance, while opting to purchase different stocks instead. This trend indicates a shift in investment strategies among traders.

news.headline: Oracle plans a massive Stargate project to boost stock rally, attracting investor attention.
news.summary: Investors are caught up in the attention-grabbing Stargate project, which is causing a divide among them. With Oracle showing interest in this megaproject to potentially reignite a stock rally, the project has become a focal point. This development is being closely followed by investors, eager to see how it unfolds.

news.headline: Talen Energy stock soars after Morgan Stanley initiates with overweight rating and high target. Nuclear energy stocks rise amid megacap pledge.
news.summary: Talen Energy saw a significant boost as Morgan Stanley rated it overweight with a high target. The nuclear energy sector, including Talen, experienced a surge in stock prices following a positive initiation. This increase came in the wake of a large investment commitment from a megacap company.

news.headline: AMG Critical Materials N.V. has published its 2024 Annual Report, disclosed in Amsterdam on 12th March 2025.
news.summary: The 2024 Annual Report of AMG Critical Materials N.V. has been released on 12 March 2025. AMG is listed on EURONEXT AMSTERDAM under the symbol "AMG."

news.headline: Societe Generale proposes renewals and new appointments for board members at the General Meeting on May 20, 2025.
news.summary: Proposals for the renewal and appointment of board members have been put forth for the upcoming general meeting scheduled to take place on May 20, 2025. Shareholders are set to vote on the new appointments and renewals, which will shape the future direction of the company. Key decisions regarding the board structure and leadership positions will be made during this important gathering. Stay tuned for updates on the outcomes of the meeting and the individuals chosen to serve on the board.

news.headline: Optimizely named Leader for 8th year in '25 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Content Marketing, highest for 'Ability to Execute'.
news.summary: Optimizely has been acknowledged as a Leader for the eighth year in a row and has received the highest ranking for 'Ability to Execute' in the 2025 report. The announcement was made by the leading digital experience platform (DXP) provider based in New York on March 12, 2025. This marks another year of recognition for Optimizely, solidifying its position at the forefront of the industry.

news.headline: Mallinckrodt and Endo negotiating merger deal, seeking to join forces in billion-dollar deal.
Warner Bros. Studio Tour Hollywood celebrates Superman Day with special event on April 18, 2025, offering access to rare DC props and a screening of "Superman: The Movie."
news.summary: A unique event is scheduled for April 18, 2025, featuring exclusive access to rare DC memorabilia, comics, and costumes. The event will also include meet-and-greet sessions with DC artists and a screening of the classic 1978 film "Superman: The Movie." Taking place in Burbank, California, the one-day celebration is in honor of Superman Day. Warner Bros. is organizing the event, promising an exciting experience for fans.

news.headline: WH Press Sec. Leavitt: The National Security Adviser spoke with Russian Foreign Minister Lavrov today.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt: Witkoff is traveling to Moscow later this week.
Xander orders largest batch of Vuzix AR Smart Glasses to assist 48 million Americans with hearing loss.
news.summary: Vuzix® Corporation, a major supplier of AI-driven smart glasses, is launching XanderGlasses to cater to the 48 million Americans facing hearing impairments. This initiative aims to support individuals with hearing loss in the United States. The company, listed as VUZI on NASDAQ, is headquartered in Rochester, N.Y. XanderGlasses utilize waveguides and augmented reality technology to provide innovative solutions for those struggling with hearing difficulties. This development was announced on March 12, 2025.

news.headline: Genmab A/S managerial employees and closely associated persons conduct transactions with company shares and linked securities.
Medicine Hat school support workers reject 3% yearly wage increase offer from employer, with 79.1% voting no. Total votes: 235.
news.summary: In Medicine Hat, Alberta, members of CUPE 829 at the Medicine Hat Public Schools have declined the employer's "final offer." The vote, overseen by the Alberta Labour Relations Board at the School District's request, recently concluded. Unofficial results indicate 20.9% voted in favor (Yes), while 79.1% opposed (No), with a total of 235 votes cast out of 274 eligible members. The offer from the school district entailed a 3% annual wage raise over four years. This scenario reflects the provincial government's wage negotiations.

news.headline: Tech-heavy indices rebounded on Wednesday as inflation eased, with CPI dropping to 2.8% and core inflation to 3.1%. Traders now predict an 80% chance of a Federal Reserve rate cut by June. Tariff tensions between the U.S. and EU/Canada persist.
news.summary: Tech-heavy indices rebounded on Wednesday as traders found relief in a cooler-than-expected inflation report, amidst ongoing trade tensions. The Consumer Price Index for February decreased from 3% year-over-year to 2.8%, surpassing predictions for a slowdown to 2.9%. Core inflation also dropped more than anticipated, easing from 3.3% to 3.1%. This decline was supported by declines in key categories, with gasoline prices falling 1% month-over-month and transportation costs down 0.8%. Airline fares experienced a more significant drop, contracting by 4%. The softer inflation data has heightened expectations for Federal Reserve rate cuts, with traders now assigning an almost 80% probability of a decrease by June, according to CME's FedWatch Tool. As optimism grew with the inflation relief, concerns regarding trade remained. In April, the U.S. imposed 25% tariffs on steel and aluminum, leading to swift retaliation. Consequently, the EU implemented tariffs on €26 billion worth of U.S. goods, while Canada...

news.headline: Societe Generale: 2025 Universal Registration Document now available with the annual financial report.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that sales of electric vehicles (EVs) have surged by 150% in the past year, with a total of 2.5 million EVs sold worldwide. This growth is attributed to the increasing demand for sustainable transportation options and government incentives promoting EV adoption. The top-selling EV models were the Tesla Model 3, Nissan Leaf, and the Chevrolet Bolt. The continued expansion of charging infrastructure and advancements in battery technology are expected to further drive the growth of the EV market in the coming years.

news.headline: Global market for 3D cultures and organoids growing rapidly due to tech advancements and shift towards non-animal testing in research. BCC Research study reports increasing demand.
news.summary: The market for laboratory models, 3D cultures, and organoids is experiencing significant growth due to advancements in technology and the increasing requirement for non-animal research testing methods. A report released on March 12, 2025, highlights that the demand for Laboratory Animal Alternatives is on the rise. The study conducted by BCC Research indicates a substantial increase in this market segment, which is driven by the necessity to find alternatives to animal testing. The report reveals that the market size for lab models, 3D cultures, and organoids is expected to reach a remarkable figure, underlining the shifting dynamics within the research industry.

news.headline: Hello Kitty Island Adventure sells 500K copies in 30 days on Nintendo Switch and PC via Steam - Sunblink's success.
news.summary: A popular indie game called Hello Kitty Island Adventure, created by Sunblink, has achieved over 500,000 digital sales for Nintendo Switch and PC on the Steam platform.

news.headline: Societe Generale released their 2025 Universal Registration Document with financial report today. #SocieteGenerale #2025Doc
news.summary: In the latest statistics, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.3%, which is the lowest it has been in the last ten years. The number of new job creations has reached a record high of 350,000 in the last quarter. Additionally, the GDP growth for this year is expected to be around 3.8%, a significant increase compared to the previous year. These positive economic indicators are seen as a result of various government initiatives to boost job creation and economic growth.

news.headline: WSI® launches Kase™, its new brand for omnichannel 3PL services, offering complete solutions for retailers.
news.summary: WSI® (Warehouse Specialists, LLC®) recently introduced a comprehensive omnichannel fulfillment service tailored for modern multichannel retailers. This leading privately owned U.S. logistics, distribution, storage, and fulfillment company announced the launch on March 12, 2025, in Appleton, Wisconsin. Serving as one of the largest firms in the industry, WSI® specializes in providing end-to-end solutions for companies seeking to optimize their supply chain operations.

news.headline: Weekly update on share buyback program activity with key details available.

Genmab A/S appoints new Board of Directors with Ms. Deirdre P. Connelly as Chair, granting 13,926 restricted stock units and 4,214 warrants to employees. Stocks worth DKK 1,372.50 each will vest after 3 years. Warrants, each worth DKK 421.30, vest 3 years post-grant, expiring in 7 years. Genmab aims to improve patient lives with innovative antibody therapeutics.
news.summary: Genmab A/S held its Annual General Meeting on March 12, 2025, following which the Company’s Board of Directors met. Ms. Deirdre P. Connelly was appointed Chair, and Ms. Pernille Erenbjerg was appointed Deputy Chair. The Board decided to grant 13,926 restricted stock units to members and employees, along with 4,214 warrants to employees. Each restricted stock unit is equivalent to one share with a fair value of DKK 1,372.50, vesting after three years. The warrants have an exercise price of DKK 1,372.50, with a fair value of DKK 421.30, and vest after three years, expiring on the seventh anniversary. Genmab aims to improve patient lives with innovative therapies by 2030.

news.headline: G2 introduces new innovations to boost exposure with software buyers, expanding syndication to AWS, Azure, and Ramp.
news.summary: In Chicago, G2 unveiled new features aimed at boosting companies' visibility among consumers and potential clients. The latest innovations include syndication to prominent marketplaces such as AWS, Azure, and newly added Ramp, along with tools to improve and speed up the process of gathering reviews. Godard Abel, CEO of G2, emphasized the company's commitment to becoming a highly reliable data source in the era of artificial intelligence for guiding software purchases. The enhancements aim to reach customers at every stage of their software research journey.

news.headline: Flerish Hydration partners with Rolling Loud for 2025 LA festival, enhancing wellness and music.
news.summary: A collaboration between Flerish Hydration and Rolling Loud aims to enhance wellness and music experiences at the Los Angeles Festival. The partnership, revealed on March 12, 2025, brings together Flerish Hydration, an emerging brand in the beverage sector, and Rolling Loud. The alliance seeks to provide festival-goers with innovative wellness solutions while enjoying music performances. This partnership is set to make a significant impact at the festival, offering attendees a unique blend of hydration and entertainment.

news.headline: WH Press Sec. Leavitt: I'm unsure if Trump extended expired Russian oil waiver.
WH Press Sec. Leavitt: The administration is focused on driving down costs.
Former NYS Assemblywoman Aileen Gunther will consult for The Center for Discovery, raising community awareness.
news.summary: Community Relations Strategist Position to Increase Local Community Awareness of TCFD Center in Harris, New York as of March 12, 2025. Aileen Gunther, former New York State Assemblywoman, to assume the role to enhance TCFD's presence.

news.headline: CITGO Lemont Refinery raised $192,000 for MDA with 288 bowlers from 48 companies in the 14th Annual Shamrock Bowl.
news.summary: In Lemont, Illinois, on March 12, 2025, the CITGO Lemont Refinery organized a successful fundraising event. The 14th Annual MDA Shamrock Bowl brought together 288 bowlers from 48 different companies, resulting in a record-breaking donation of $192,000 for the Muscular Dystrophy Association. The event has seen continued growth and support, with participants expressing gratitude for the opportunity to contribute to such a worthy cause.

news.headline: Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX) announces leadership transition as Sharran Srivatsaa moves from President to the Board of Directors effective June 1, 2025.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, The Real Brokerage Inc. (NASDAQ: REAX), a leading technology platform in the real estate industry, stated that Sharran Srivatsaa will be stepping down from his position as the President of Real to become a member of the company's Board of Directors starting from June 1, 2025, pending corporate approvals. The move is seen as a strategic decision to further enhance the company's operations and governance. According to the statement released, Srivatsaa's significant contributions and dedication to Real's mission have played a pivotal role in influencing the company's culture and driving its growth.

news.headline: Paychex, Inc. to announce Q3 fiscal 2025 results on March 26, 2025. Conference call with CEO & CFO at 9:30 am ET.
news.summary: Rochester, New York - Paychex, Inc. is set to announce its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2025, which concluded on February 28, 2025. The report will be disclosed through Business Wire before the markets open on Wednesday, March 26, 2025. A conference call is scheduled for 9:30 a.m. ET on the same day for the review of the quarterly results. Key executives like John Gibson, the president and CEO, and Bob Schrader, the senior vice president and CFO, will be present during the call. This conference call is important for stakeholders and investors.

news.headline: Heritage Global Partners will auction Electriq Power's assets. U.S. Bankruptcy Court appointed them. Unique opportunity for alternative energy businesses. Case # 9:24-bk-15235.
news.summary: In San Diego, Heritage Global Partners, a division of Heritage Global Inc. (NASDAQ: HGBL), specializing in asset advisory and auction services, has received the mandate from the U.S. Bankruptcy Court to oversee an online auction for assets belonging to Electriq Power (Case # 9:24-bk-15235), a well-known smart energy storage company. This auction offers a distinct chance for players in the alternative energy industry to purchase top-notch equipment at competitive prices.

news.headline: Euna Solutions to host webinar on Navigating Federal Policy Changes in Grants for public sector teams.
news.summary: Euna Solutions, a leading organization in Toronto and Chicago, is set to host a live webinar titled “Navigating Federal Policy Changes in Grants: Actionable Strategies for Public Sector Teams.” The webinar aims to address the evolving federal grant policies following new executive orders and agency rule modifications. State and local governments, as well as other grant-seeking entities, will need to adjust to updated compliance requirements, eligibility criteria, and changing funding focuses. Understanding these adjustments is crucial as they can significantly impact budgets and operations.

news.headline: US budget gap hits record $1.1 trln for first 5 months of fiscal year.
CoinShares International Limited announced the exercise of 25,000 options in their Employee Incentive Plan, generating GBP 35,750.
news.summary: On Wednesday, March 12, 2025, in Saint Helier, Jersey, CoinShares International Limited disclosed that 25,000 options from the Employee Incentive Plan - November 2020 Tranche have been exercised, leading to the acquisition of the same number of shares at a price of GBP 1.43 (SEK 18.56) per share. This exercise has generated a total of GBP 35,750 (SEK 464,041.64) for the Company. CoinShares, a renowned global investment firm specializing in digital assets, is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm Market under CS and on US OTCQX as CNSRF.

news.headline: New paper in Alzheimer's & Dementia discusses ocular biomarkers for early Alzheimer's detection, blood biomarkers as standard.
news.summary: According to recent research reported in Alzheimer's & Dementia, blood biomarkers are anticipated to replace current methods for diagnosing Alzheimer's disease. This shift is expected to provide a more standard and accurate diagnostic approach. Additionally, ocular tests are emerging as a non-invasive alternative for identifying individuals at risk of developing the condition. These advancements were highlighted in a study published in New York on March 12, 2025. These new methods signify a significant advancement in Alzheimer's detection and could potentially revolutionize how the disease is diagnosed.

news.headline: OKX Europe acquires MiFID II license at exclusive event in Malta. Leading blockchain company expands institutional offering.
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Malta, OKX, a top blockchain technology firm, revealed its acquisition of a MiFID II licensed entity at an upscale event on Manoel Island. This acquisition marks a significant step for OKX in compliance and expansion in the financial sector. The event was attended by notable figures and industry professionals.

news.headline: Euro-Wall promotes key leaders to enhance Florida sales, driving growth. Elevated service for better operations.
news.summary: Euro-Wall has announced the promotion of regional leadership to enhance service quality and boost business growth in NORTH PORT, Florida. The company, known for producing top-notch custom door and window systems, is set to benefit from the reshuffle. This move is expected to fuel expansion and strengthen operations.

news.headline: Pasqua Wines celebrates 100 years with 6% revenue growth to €63.5M driven by U.S. market, plans for future innovation.
news.summary: Pasqua Wines, after a decade of achievements, is moving forward by reinforcing its dedication to excellence, creativity, and its iconic wine ventures. Teaming up with Rizzoli, the winery introduces "Ode to the Future", a book celebrating its hundred years, including works from esteemed artists.

news.headline: Hawaiian artist Lehuauakea receives Emerging Native Arts Grant from Walker Youngbird Foundation, expanding Kapa craft.
news.summary: Renowned Native Hawaiian artist and skilled kapa practitioner, Lehuauakea, has recently been recognized by The Walker Youngbird Foundation for his exceptional work in expanding the boundaries of Kapa. This award-winning artist has been acknowledged for merging ancestral craft with contemporary flair. The announcement was made on March 12, 2025, in Washington, amidst growing appreciation for Lehuauakea's talents. The Foundation's recognition comes as a testament to Lehuauakea's dedication and innovation in his field.
